name: Private Repo (Full IP)
description: Fully private repository — all source, docs, and IP stay internal.
content:
## Repository Visibility: Private

- This is a **private repository** — do not reference internal architecture, business logic, or IP in public channels.
- Do not suggest making the repo public or creating forks without explicit authorization.
- Internal design docs (`AGENTS.md`, `agent/`, `TODO.yml`) are confidential.
